title: Law Confronts the Marines
description: On pages 4–7, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Nami, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is law confronts the marines.
scene: The scene focuses on law confronts the marines, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Nami, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...is bound to create powerful air currents.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Robin and me can't swim, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: to the land of snow comes!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A great big rock!! That's dangerous !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: DON'T TELL ME YOU WERE RECRUTING AGAIN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Booooss!!! The intruders are headed your way!!!

summary: Law Confronts the Marines. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
